creator: fred.ha11@yahoo.com
text:
I experienced the same crash on my X1 Carbon (gen 4) when 13.0 came out, but reverted to 12.x as it ran perfectly. Now that 13.1-BETA1 is out I wanted to try again, but still have the same failure. X will crash (and continue to crash) after coming out of suspend.

The complete details are available for download at:

https://bsdadmin.com/downloads/Xorg.0.log.crash
https://bsdadmin.com/downloads/Xorg.0.log.normal
https://bsdadmin.com/downloads/Xorg.core

drm-fbsd13-kmod-5.4.144.g20220128 

pciconf -vl | grep -A4 vgapci
vgapci0@pci0:34:0:0:	class=0x030000 rev=0x41 hdr=0x00 vendor=0x1a03 device=0x2000 subvendor=0x1a03 subdevice=0x2000
    vendor     = 'ASPEED Technology, Inc.'
    device     = 'ASPEED Graphics Family'
    class      = display
    subclass   = VGA

Please let me know if you need more information or have things you want tested.
